# Demo Credit Union — Full Reference

> Complete product details, rate tables, branch information, and FAQs for AI assistants.
> NOTE: This is a fictional credit union used to demonstrate the Open Banking Platform. All rates, products, locations, and personnel are illustrative examples. In production, all content is configured per-tenant.

---

## ORGANIZATION

Name: Demo Credit Union
Also known as: Demo CU
Type: Federal Credit Union (not-for-profit financial cooperative)
Charter: Chartered by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA)
Founded: 1952
Headquarters: 100 Credit Union Way, Anytown, US 10001
CEO: Sarah Chen
CFO: Marcus Williams
COO: Rachel Kim
CTO: David Okafor
Total Assets: $3.2 billion
Members: 175,000+
Employees: 850+
Branches: Multiple locations nationwide
ATM Network: 85,000+ surcharge-free (CO-OP + Allpoint)
Shared Branching: 5,000+ locations nationwide via CO-OP network
NMLS: #123456
Routing Number: 265473851
SWIFT/BIC: DMCUUS33

---

## SAVINGS PRODUCTS

### Regular Savings
- APY: 0.45%
- Minimum to open: $5.00
- Minimum to earn APY: $5.00
- Monthly fee: None
- Dividends: Paid monthly
- Requirements: Membership share account

### High-Yield Savings
- APY: 4.25%
- Minimum to open: $500
- Minimum to earn APY: $500
- Monthly fee: None
- Dividends: Paid monthly
- Withdrawal limit: 6 per month

### Money Market Account
- APY: 4.50% (balances $2,500+), 3.75% (balances $500-$2,499), 0.25% (below $500)
- Minimum to open: $500
- Check writing: Yes (6 checks/month)
- Debit card: Optional

### Share Certificates (CDs)
| Term     | APY   | Min Deposit | Early Withdrawal Penalty |
|----------|-------|-------------|--------------------------|
| 3-Month  | 4.25% | $500        | 30 days interest         |
| 6-Month  | 4.75% | $500        | 90 days interest         |
| 12-Month | 5.00% | $500        | 180 days interest        |
| 24-Month | 4.50% | $500        | 180 days interest        |
| 36-Month | 4.25% | $1,000      | 365 days interest        |
| 60-Month | 4.00% | $1,000      | 365 days interest        |

- Dividends compounded daily, paid monthly
- Auto-renewal at maturity
- IRA CDs available at same rates
- Jumbo CDs ($100K+): add 0.10% APY bonus

---

## CHECKING PRODUCTS

### Basic Checking
- Monthly fee: $0 (free)
- Minimum balance: None
- Debit card: Free Visa debit
- ATMs: 85,000+ surcharge-free
- Overdraft protection: Optional link to savings
- Direct deposit: Yes, get paid up to 2 days early

### Premium Checking
- Monthly fee: $0 with $1,500 minimum daily balance ($8/month otherwise)
- APY: 0.10% on all balances
- Free checks (first box)
- Free cashier's checks
- Free wire transfers (domestic, up to 3/month)
- Debit card rewards: 0.25% cash back

### Student Checking
- Eligibility: Ages 13-24
- Monthly fee: $0
- No minimum balance
- Free debit card
- Financial literacy resources
- Auto-converts to Basic Checking at age 25

---

## LOAN PRODUCTS

### Personal Loans
- APR: from 7.49% (with autopay discount)
- Amounts: $1,000 - $50,000
- Terms: 12-84 months
- No origination fee
- No prepayment penalty
- Unsecured

### Auto Loans — New
- APR: from 5.24%
- Terms: 36, 48, 60, 72, 84 months
- Max LTV: 125% (includes tax, title, warranties)
- No prepayment penalty
- Dealership or private party

### Auto Loans — Used
- APR: from 5.74%
- Vehicle age: Up to 7 model years old
- Terms: 36-72 months
- Max LTV: 120%

### Auto Loan Refinance
- APR: from 5.49%
- Refinance from any lender
- Skip-a-payment option available

### Home Equity Loan
- APR: from 6.99% fixed
- Amounts: $10,000 - $500,000
- Terms: 5-30 years
- LTV: up to 90%
- No closing costs on lines under $250K

### Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC)
- APR: Prime + 0.50% (currently 8.50%)
- Draw period: 10 years
- Repayment period: 20 years
- Min draw: $5,000

---

## MORTGAGE PRODUCTS

| Product      | Rate   | APR   | Points |
|-------------|--------|-------|--------|
| 30-Year Fixed | 6.375% | 6.50% | 0.0    |
| 15-Year Fixed | 5.750% | 5.89% | 0.0    |
| 5/1 ARM      | 5.25%  | 5.45% | 0.0    |
| FHA 30-Year  | 6.00%  | 6.80% | 0.0    |
| VA 30-Year   | 5.875% | 6.10% | 0.0    |

- Jumbo loans: Available for amounts above $766,550
- First-time homebuyer programs with down payment assistance
- Closing cost credits for members with $50K+ in deposits
- Construction-to-permanent loans available
- Pre-approval: Apply online, decision within 24 hours

---

## CREDIT CARDS

### Rewards Visa
- APR: 14.99% - 24.99% variable
- Annual fee: $0
- Rewards: 2% cash back on dining and gas, 1% on everything else
- Sign-up bonus: $200 after $1,000 spend in first 3 months
- No foreign transaction fees
- Cell phone protection included

### Cash Back Card
- APR: 13.99% - 23.99% variable
- Annual fee: $0
- Rewards: 1.5% unlimited cash back on all purchases
- Sign-up bonus: $150 after $500 spend in first 3 months
- 0% intro APR for 15 months on purchases and balance transfers

### Low Rate Card
- APR: 8.99% - 18.99% variable
- Annual fee: $0
- Best for: Balance transfers and carrying a balance
- 0% intro APR for 21 months on balance transfers
- No balance transfer fee for first 60 days

---

## DIGITAL BANKING

### Online Banking
- Account overview and transaction history
- Bill pay with scheduled and recurring payments
- Internal and external transfers
- Account-to-account (A2A) linking
- eStatements
- Secure messaging

### Mobile App (iOS & Android)
- Mobile check deposit (up to $5,000/day for established accounts)
- Card controls: lock/unlock, set spending limits, travel notifications
- Person-to-person payments
- Branch and ATM locator with GPS
- Biometric login (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint)
- Push notification alerts
- Widget for quick balance check

### Security Features
- Multi-factor authentication (MFA)
- Real-time fraud monitoring
- Instant card lock/unlock
- Transaction alerts (customizable thresholds)
- Secure messaging
- Session timeout after 10 minutes of inactivity

---

## SAMPLE BRANCH LOCATIONS

Note: In production, branch locations are configured per-tenant. The following are sample locations for demonstration purposes.

1. Main Branch — 100 Credit Union Way, Anytown, US 10001
2. Downtown Branch — 250 Main Street, Anytown, US 10002
3. Westside Branch — 1500 Market St, Anytown, US 10003
4. Northside Branch — 7401 Commerce Ave, Anytown, US 10004
5. Eastside Branch — 100 E Main St, Anytown, US 10005

### Hours
- Monday-Friday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed
- Drive-through: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM

- General: (800) 555-0199
- Fraud Hotline: (800) 555-3728 (24/7)
- Lost/Stolen Card: (800) 555-2273 (24/7)
- Mortgage Center: (800) 555-4663
- Business Banking: (800) 555-2491
- Email: support@example-cu.org
- Fax: (800) 555-0198
- TTY/TDD: 711

### Phone Hours
- Monday-Friday: 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST
- Saturday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM EST
- Sunday: Closed

- Twitter/X: @examplecu

- YouTube: youtube.com/examplecu

---

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: Who can join Demo Credit Union?
A: In this demo, membership is open to everyone. In production, eligibility criteria are configured per-tenant.

Q: What is the routing number?
A: 265473851 (sample)

Q: How do I get paid early with direct deposit?
A: Set up direct deposit and you may receive your paycheck up to 2 days early. This applies to ACH deposits from recognized payroll providers.

Q: What are the ATM fees?
A: Members pay no surcharge at 85,000+ CO-OP and Allpoint ATMs nationwide. If you use an out-of-network ATM, the ATM owner may charge a fee.

Q: How do I report fraud?
A: Call our 24/7 fraud hotline at (800) 555-3728. For online banking concerns, use secure messaging in the app or website.

Q: Is my money safe?
A: Yes. Deposits are federally insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) up to $250,000 per member, per account ownership category.

Q: What is the difference between a credit union and a bank?
A: Credit unions are not-for-profit cooperatives owned by their members. This means better rates, lower fees, and profits returned to members rather than shareholders.

Q: How do I apply for a loan?
A: Apply online through our website or mobile app, call us, or visit any branch. Most personal and auto loan decisions are made within 24 hours.

Q: Can I use mobile deposit?
A: Yes. Our mobile app supports check deposits up to $5,000/day for established accounts ($2,500 for new accounts).

Q: Do you offer business accounts?
A: Yes. We offer business checking, savings, and lending products. Contact our business banking team at (800) 555-2491.

---

## COMMUNITY INVOLVEMENT

### Community Foundation
- Annual giving: $2.5M+
- Focus areas: Financial literacy, affordable housing, youth development, small business
- Since 1952: $50M+ in total community investment

### Scholars Program
- Annual budget: $250,000
- Number of scholarships: 50 awards of $5,000 each
- Eligibility: Members or dependents, 3.0+ GPA, enrolled in accredited institution
- Applications: January 1 - March 31 annually
- Since 2005: $4M+ awarded to 800+ students

### Volunteer Program
- 850+ employees
- 15,000+ volunteer hours annually
- Matching gift program (up to $1,000/employee/year)

All rates, products, locations, and personnel are illustrative examples.
